title: Announcing New Ellis Porter Office Locations in Troy, ﻿Ann Arbor and Southwest Detroit. — ELLIS PORTER
content:
We're excited to announce that we're relocating our Troy and Ann Arbor offices to new, expanded locations, and we've also launched a new community office in Southwest Detroit.
In Troy and Ann Arbor , we've been bursting at the seams for a while, (yes, that's a wonderful thing!), so it was time to move on up to larger offices with more room to keep growing. We've designed our new offices with more space for collaboration and more technology, which will help our team continue to provide clients like you with the best immigration services around.
In Southwest Detroit , we've launched a new office in the heart of the community so we can better understand and serve the needs of our neighbors in this diverse and vibrant part of the city.
Here's how to find us at our new office in Troy (in the PNC Center building) :
Ellis Porter PLC 755 W. Big Beaver Road, Suite 1100 Troy, MI 48084 Phone: 248-519-9900
Here's how to find us at our new office in Ann Arbor: Ellis Porter PLC 2211 Old Earhart Road, Suite 160 Ann Arbor, MI 48105 Phone: 734-794-7724
Here's how to find us at our new office in Southwest Detroit: Ellis Porter PLC 6301 Michigan Avenue Detroit, MI 48210 Phone: 313-329-2333
For the past few months, we've had a top-notch team hard at work putting a plan in place to assure a smooth transition for our clients as we moved to our new offices. If you have any questions about our new office locations, please contact any member of your Ellis Porter legal services team and they will be happy to answer them for you. From all of us at Ellis Porter, we look forward to serving you from our new Troy, Ann Arbor and Southwest Detroit office locations!
